PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Continued To Sep-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Marguerite Davis (Petitioner).
Kevin Lachona for Sheila Tyler (Objector).

Ms. Calhoun stated that she is not planning on doing publication or notice for the general petition until they determine if there are any assets. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not there is sufficient urgency to warrant issuance of special letters/appointment of a Special Administrator. There was also discussion as to what has occured with missing funds, actions taken by one of the relatives, as to whether filing of a Trust petition would be appropriate and as to whether or not Mr. Lachona's Client would be filing a competing petition. The matter was taken under submission.
Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Denied
